name: librals-backend
description: Microservices backend for Librals E-Commerce and Rental platform

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=services/gateway" "npm run dev --workspace=services/user-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/catalog-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/order-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/payment-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/custom-request"
